shared_properties: Pointed head crest, eye slit, and cloak-like lower body.
differences: Legs tuck upward for a 12 px lift silhouette.
Arms lift into a narrow overhead reach.
Lower body narrows into a vertical arc for airborne readability.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra silhouette, limb taper, eye glow placement, and cloak-like vapor edge anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on the UmbraActor entity and drive frame swaps from the jump state rather than physics interpolation.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_jump_4f_12fps.png through AssetServer and bind it to the jump start and airborne state handler.
runtime_notes: Sequence can hold the final airborne frame if vertical velocity stays positive beyond frame 4.
Origin remains at the rear foot start point for clean land-to-idle recovery.
Jump atlas must read clearly against bright beam backgrounds without adding interior detail noise.

context.usage: Airborne pose for crossing tilted platforms, short beam gaps, and ladder exits during puzzle traversal.

shape.silhouette: Compact airborne shadow arc with tucked knees, upward arms, and a narrow trailing hem that points toward the takeoff point.

appendages.accessories: Gold chest sigil retained at torso center.

specs.texture: Smooth silhouette with a single soft teal underside edge.
specs.shading: Black core mass with minimal teal lift under the torso and bright eye cut.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 128x48 px with four 32x48 frames.
Peak airborne frame raises the head crest by at least 8 px relative to frame 1.
Arms and lower body stay inside the 32x48 frame on every frame with no cropped pixels.
